ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02746Cornell AIDS Action records51-1-2746Compiled by Andrea Hektor, Brenda MarstonDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
July 7, 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
humsxThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:55:27 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell AIDS Action records
Cornell AIDS Action
51-1-2746
5 cubic feet.
16 mapcase folders.
30 videocassettes.
1987-1996 Subject files, printed material, videos. Records of the Sexuality and AIDS educator (1987-1990) and Coordinator of Cornell AIDS Action (1990-1992), Sharon J. Dittman. Includes records of the CU AIDS Advisory Committee (1991-1992); training, workshop, and resource materials from Cornell AIDS Action and SAFER (Students for AIDS Facts Education and Responsibility); clippings on sexuality, religion, and other topics; also, educational videos on AIDS and sexuality. Collection material in English 2297689
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Andrea Hektor
Date completed:
September 2003
EAD encoding:
Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, September 2003RMC staff, December 2007
Date modified:
RMC Staff, April 2018
RELATED MATERIALS
Collecting Program: Human Sexuality Collection.
Related Collection: Cornell Biology and Society 451, "AIDS and Society," scrapbooks, #21-44-3298.
Arrangement
Series I. Annual Reports Box 1
Series II. AIDS and Society (B+S451) Class Materials Box 1
Series III. Training/Workshop Materials Boxes 1-3
Series IV. Subject Files Boxes 2-4
Series V. Media
Videos Tape Recordings
Series VI. Posters Boxes 5-6, oversize folders
United States
International
Cite As:
Cornell AIDS Action records, #51-1-2746. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Records of Cornell AIDS Action, reflecting the work of Sharon J. Dittman, the Sexuality and AIDS educator (1987-1090) and Coordinator of Cornell AIDS Action (1990-1992). Includes annual reports (1991-1995); records of the CU AIDS Advisory Committee (1991-1992); Dittman's and the Peer Educators' subject files and educational videos on AIDS and sexuality; and training, workshop, and resource materials from Cornell AIDS Action, Peer Educators, and SAFER (Students for AIDS Facts Education and Responsibility), including The AIDS Education Game.
Scope and content
Course packs from Spring and Fall 1992, Fall 1993, and Fall 1994, for "AIDS and Society" class (Biology and Society 451), which Dittman co-taught with Ari van Tienhoven. Includes "I Think Mr. Jingles has AIDS!" a children's book designed by three students in the Fall 1992 class.
Scope and content
AIDS and safe sex posters in numerous languages and from various organizations, mostly from 31 states and the District of Columbia in the United States, as well as from 9 other countries.
Videocassettes. Posters. Sex -- Study and teaching. Safe sex in AIDS prevention -- Posters. AIDS (Disease) -- Study and teaching. AIDS (Disease) -- Prevention. Students -- Health and hygiene. Dittman, Sharon J. Van Tienhoven, Ari. Cornell University -- : Students. SAFER (Cornell University) Cornell University. AIDS Advisory Committee

Scope and Contents
Determinants of Risk-Reduction Behavioral Change in Regard to AIDS Among Cornell University Undergraduate Students, thesis by Terry RubinsteinSex and religion223"Common Sense About AIDS: The Patient Education Resource"224Programs225Resource guide for the Cornell Community226AIDS articles: medical227Science1988 February 5228AIDS articles: human experience229-30HIV Not Until My Baby Was Born With It"19891Alabama Department of Public Health AIDS Prevention Program, What's Your Chance of Getting AIDS Tonight?"19891Alabama Department of Public Health AIDS Prevention Program, "You CANNOT get AIDS from..."19881American Red Cross-HIV/AIDS ProgramPosters with proverbs from Ethiopia, Guinea, Cameroon, Ghana, and Sierra Leone15ArizonaMaricopa Area Health Education Center, "The Positive Woman"1CaliforniaAsian AIDS Project, "It's Natural"1CDC, displayed at Stanford, "Don't just worry about HIV..."1CDC, displayed at Stanford, "This is the way many people deal with HIV."1Department of Public Health, City and County of San Francisco, "AIDS: Phòng Benh Hon Chua Benh..." (in Tagalog)1Kimono Condoms, "Wrap your man in pleasure: Kimono Condoms"1Kimono Condoms, "...you remember buying the beer, setting the alarm, and getting the condom..."1Korean Community Service Center, "Remember... Any Race Can Get Aids" (in English and Korean)1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Be A Rubberman- Use A Condom Every Time1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Be Here for the Cure" [2 copies]1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Dress for the occasion."19881San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Get Carried Away With Condoms"19901San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Life Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness"1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "The moral majority... Family values... Right to life"1Centers for Disease Control"1800-AIDS-TTY"3"AIDS is a problem for Hispanics, too." (one in English, one in Spanish)3"A message to the third man in my life."3"Ayudando una persona que tiene SIDA" (in Spanish)3"A man who shoots up can be very giving."3"¿Cómo se adquiere el SIDA?" (in Spanish)3"Do You Talk About AIDS On The First Date?"3"El licor, el crack y otras drogas..." (in Spanish)3"Existe una conección entre el SIDA y las enfermedades venéreas." (in Spanish)3"Getting high doesn't cause AIDS." [2 sizes]3"Have You Talked With Your Wife About AIDS?"3"Heard Much About AIDS Lately?"3"How About Dinner, A Movie, And A Talk About AIDS?" [2 sizes]3"How much do your children know about AIDS?"3"How Would You Deal With It If One Of You Got AIDS?"3"If Your Man Is Dabbling In Drugs..."3"It might take more than motherwit to tell my children what to do about AIDS."3"If he doesn't have a condom..." [2 versions]3"If you get the AIDS virus now..." [2 sizes]3"Most people think HIV is only a problem in big cities..."3"No Matter What Shape You're In, Anyone Can Get The AIDS Virus"3"On the wrong track" [3 sizes]3"Putting On A Condom Is Just As Simple"3"Sharing Needles Can Get You More Than High"4"She shows all the signs of having HIV." [2 versions]4"Since I got HIV..."4"Stop Worrying About How You Won't Get AIDS..."19934"There's a simple way to prevent AIDS."4"This is the way many people deal with HIV."19914"Today, almost one million Americans are infected with HIV."4"Today, people with HIV are doing something most of us didn't think possible."4"What Have You Got Against A Condom?" (6 copies in English, 2 copies in Spanish)4"When I found out I had HIV at age 17, I learned that anyone can get it."19934"Why alcohol, crack and other drugs can put you at risk for the AIDS virus."4"With AIDS around, gonorrhea, syphilis & herpes are fair warning."4"You Won't Get AIDS From A Bug Bite."4"You Won't Get AIDS In A Restaurant."4ColoradoColorado Department of Education, "How Well Do You Know The 63 People You Had Sex With Last Night?"1Colorado Department of Health, "Aids Kills. Bleach Works. Use It!" (in Spanish)7New Jersey AIDS Hotline, "Look at who can get AIDS."7New Jersey Department of Health, "Does she or doesn't she?"7New Jersey Department of Health, "Guess who else can get AIDS if you shoot drugs?"19897New Jersey Department of Health, "If you or your partner ever shot drugs..."19897New Jersey Department of Health, "She has her father's eyes and her mother's AIDS."7New Jersey Department of Health, "SIDA Ataca Tamién a los Machos" (in Spanish)7New MexicoAlbuquerque Area Indian Health Board, "Be Aware."7Albuquerque Area Indian Health Board, "Be In Control."7Albuquerque Area Indian Health Board, "Be Smart."7Albuquerque Area Indian Health Board, "Be Strong."7New Mexico Health and Environment Department, "AIDS: If You've Taken The Risks...Take The Test." [2 versions]7Southwest AIDS Committee, "If You Love Them, Protect Them." (one copy in English, one copy in Spanish)7New YorkAIDS Drug Assistance Program, "I'm HIV positive..." (one copy in English, one copy in Spanish)8AIDS Task Force of Central New York, "AIDS Walk + Run '93"19938AIDS Work, "The show all the signs of having HIV."19918AIDS Work, "You Won't Get AIDS From A Public Pool."8AIDS Work, "You Won't Get AIDS From Hide 'N' Seek."8Alfred University, "Avoid The AIDS Ball"8Alfred University, "Do you want to Screw Aids?"8Alfred University, "Exposed"8Alfred University, "he didn't use a condom"8Alfred University, "One good reason to use condoms"8Alfred University, "Who is HIV positive?"8Cornell University, two heart-shaped collage posters9Cornell University, "AIDS Means..."9Cornell University, "Acquired Independent Determinant Style"9Cornell University, "Chain Of Names"9Cornell University, "Sex Sex Sex"9Cornell University, "What AIDS Awareness Is..."9Cornell University Health Center, "Numbers"9Cornell University Health Center, "Respect Yourself"9Cornell University, materials from World AIDS Day and the AIDS Memorial Quilt display at Cornell University. Items include: "The AIDS Memorial Quilt, WSH Memorial Room" poster, 2 hand-made posters for World Aids Day 1996, 4 posters of HIV/AIDS statistics and information, 1 "Fight AIDS" poster, an "AIDS Affects All" poster produced by the International Students and Scholars Office at Cornell (multilingual) and materials from the creation of the poster, a "Please Be Aware Some Posters Contain Nude Images" sign, a "Let's talk about love God's Way" paper, and papers containing comments from students and staff about the World AIDS Day poster display. Also AIDS memorial quilt 2000 materials and schedules and Names Quilt 1996 material.5Cornell University, materials from World AIDS Day and the AIDS Memorial Quilt display at Cornell University. Items include: "The AIDS Memorial Quilt, WSH Memorial Room" poster, 2 hand-made posters for World Aids Day 1996, 4 posters of HIV/AIDS statistics and information, 1 "Fight AIDS" poster, an "AIDS Affects All" poster produced by the International Students and Scholars Office at Cornell (multilingual) and materials from the creation of the poster, a "Please Be Aware Some Posters Contain Nude Images" sign, a "Let's talk about love God's Way" paper, and papers containing comments from students and staff about the World AIDS Day poster display. Also AIDS memorial quilt 2000 materials and schedules and Names Quilt 1996 material.7Hetrick-Martin Institute, "You are not alone!"8Gay Men's Health Crisis, "AIDS Dance-a-thon"199210Gay Men's Health Crisis, "AIDS Walk New York"199310Gay Men's Health Crisis, "A Rubber Is A Friend In Your Pocket"198710Gay Men's Health Crisis, "Circus for Life"199210Gay Men's Health Crisis, "Cojelo Con Cuidado...Take It Safely"198910Gay Men's Health Crisis, "If You Are HIV Positive:..." One World One Hope"199612The Names Project, "The Names Project AIDS Memorial Quilt."199612Whitman-Walker Clinic, "Men of the 90's do the safe thing."12Whitman-Walker Clinic, "Positive, Negative, Both, Do The Safe Thing"12Whitman-Walker Clinic, "Top, Bottom, Both, Do The Safe Thing"12WisconsinMadison Advertising Federation, "Do You Know Who's Been Sleeping in Your Bed?"12Madison Advertising Federation, "He Loves Me. Are YOU at Risk?"12Wisconsin Department of Health and Social Services, "Don't Be A Casualty Of Casual Sex."12Wisconsin Department of Health and Social Services, "Think About It."12No LocationAcademy for Educational Development, "Partners For A World Without AIDS"13American Academy of Dermatology, "In 1985, I found out I was HIV positive..."13American Social Health Association, "In Your Heart You Know It's Right"199613The Bacchus and Gamma Peer Education Network13Design Industries Foundation Fights AIDS (DIFFA), "Safer Sex Is Hot Sex" [4 versions, all with Spanish and English]13Institut Mérieux, no words13Lifejackets Productions, "I [heart] Carefully"199313Lifejackets Productions, "Make Every Day World AIDS Day!"199313Lifejackets Productions, "What Are You Doing In The War Against AIDS?" Not Until My Baby Was Born With It"19891Alabama Department of Public Health AIDS Prevention Program, What's Your Chance of Getting AIDS Tonight?"19891Alabama Department of Public Health AIDS Prevention Program, "You CANNOT get AIDS from..."19881American Red Cross-HIV/AIDS ProgramPosters with proverbs from Ethiopia, Guinea, Cameroon, Ghana, and Sierra Leone15ArizonaMaricopa Area Health Education Center, "The Positive Woman"1CaliforniaAsian AIDS Project, "It's Natural"1CDC, displayed at Stanford, "Don't just worry about HIV..."1CDC, displayed at Stanford, "This is the way many people deal with HIV."1Department of Public Health, City and County of San Francisco, "AIDS: Phòng Benh Hon Chua Benh..." Any Race Can Get Aids" (in English and Korean)1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Be A Rubberman- Use A Condom Every Time1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Be Here for the Cure" [2 copies]1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Dress for the occasion."19881San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Get Carried Away With Condoms"19901San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "Life Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness"1San Francisco AIDS Foundation, "The moral majority... Family values... Right to life"1Centers for Disease Control"1800-AIDS-TTY"3"AIDS is a problem for Hispanics, too." (one in English, one in Spanish)3"A message to the third man in my life."3"Ayudando una persona que tiene SIDA" (in Spanish)3"A man who shoots up can be very giving."3"¿Cómo se adquiere el SIDA?" (in Spanish)3"Do You Talk About AIDS On The First Date?"3"El licor, el crack y otras drogas..." (in Spanish)3"Existe una conección entre el SIDA y las enfermedades venéreas." (in Spanish)3"Getting high doesn't cause AIDS." [2 sizes]3"Have You Talked With Your Wife About AIDS?"3"Heard Much About AIDS Lately?"3"How About Dinner, A Movie, And A Talk About AIDS?" [2 sizes]3"How much do your children know about AIDS?"3"How Would You Deal With It If One Of You Got AIDS?"3"If Your Man Is Dabbling In Drugs..."3"It might take more than motherwit to tell my children what to do about AIDS."3"If he doesn't have a condom..." [2 versions]3"If you get the AIDS virus now..." [2 sizes]3"Most people think HIV is only a problem in big cities..."3"No Matter What Shape You're In, Anyone Can Get The AIDS Virus"3"On the wrong track" [3 sizes]3"Putting On A Condom Is Just As Simple"3"Sharing Needles Can Get You More Than High"4"She shows all the signs of having HIV." [2 versions]4"Since I got HIV..."4"Stop Worrying About How You Won't Get AIDS..."19934"There's a simple way to prevent AIDS."4"This is the way many people deal with HIV."19914"Today, almost one million Americans are infected with HIV."4"Today, people with HIV are doing something most of us didn't think possible."4"What Have You Got Against A Condom?" (6 copies in English, 2 copies in Spanish)4"When I found out I had HIV at age 17, I learned that anyone can get it."19934"Why alcohol, crack and other drugs can put you at risk for the AIDS virus."4"With AIDS around, gonorrhea, syphilis & herpes are fair warning."4"You Won't Get AIDS From A Bug Bite."4"You Won't Get AIDS In A Restaurant."4ColoradoColorado Department of Education, "How Well Do You Know The 63 People You Had Sex With Last Night?"1Colorado Department of Health, "Aids Kills. Bleach Works. Use It!" (one copy in English, one copy in Spanish)8AIDS Task Force of Central New York, "AIDS Walk + Run '93"19938AIDS Work, "The show all the signs of having HIV."19918AIDS Work, "You Won't Get AIDS From A Public Pool."8AIDS Work, "You Won't Get AIDS From Hide 'N' Seek."8Alfred University, "Avoid The AIDS Ball"8Alfred University, "Do you want to Screw Aids?"8Alfred University, "Exposed"8Alfred University, "he didn't use a condom"8Alfred University, "One good reason to use condoms"8Alfred University, "Who is HIV positive?"8Cornell University, two heart-shaped collage posters9Cornell University, "AIDS Means..."9Cornell University, "Acquired Independent Determinant Style"9Cornell University, "Chain Of Names"9Cornell University, "Sex Sex Sex"9Cornell University, "What AIDS Awareness Is..."9Cornell University Health Center, "Numbers"9Cornell University Health Center, "Respect Yourself"9Cornell University, materials from World AIDS Day and the AIDS Memorial Quilt display at Cornell University. Items include: "The AIDS Memorial Quilt, WSH Memorial Room" poster, 2 hand-made posters for World Aids Day 1996, 4 posters of HIV/AIDS statistics and information, 1 "Fight AIDS" poster, an "AIDS Affects All" poster produced by the International Students and Scholars Office at Cornell (multilingual) and materials from the creation of the poster, a "Please Be Aware Some Posters Contain Nude Images" sign, a "Let's talk about love God's Way" paper, and papers containing comments from students and staff about the World AIDS Day poster display. Also AIDS memorial quilt 2000 materials and schedules and Names Quilt 1996 material.5Cornell University, materials from World AIDS Day and the AIDS Memorial Quilt display at Cornell University. Items include: "The AIDS Memorial Quilt, WSH Memorial Room" poster, 2 hand-made posters for World Aids Day 1996, 4 posters of HIV/AIDS statistics and information, 1 "Fight AIDS" poster, an "AIDS Affects All" poster produced by the International Students and Scholars Office at Cornell (multilingual) and materials from the creation of the poster, a "Please Be Aware Some Posters Contain Nude Images" sign, a "Let's talk about love God's Way" paper, and papers containing comments from students and staff about the World AIDS Day poster display. [2 copies]199413The Names Project, "The Names Project- A National AIDS Memorial"13National Council on Alcoholism and Drug Dependence, "Don't let drinking take your power away."13National Council on Alcoholism and Drug Dependence, "If You Ever Shot Drugs Get Tested Before You Get Pregnant."13National Council on Alcoholism and Drug Dependence, "Most babies with AIDS are born to mothers or fathers who have shot drugs."13National Institute on Drug Abuse, "This Fatal Accident Was Caused By Teenagers Getting Stoned And Going Too Fast."13Turtledove Clemens, Inc., "My Boyfriend Gave Me AIDS."198813US Department of Health and Human Services Social Security Administration, "Lifeline...
